mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_setting ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_setting (base_currency, target_currency, threshold_rate, alert_type, triggered) VALUES (#{baseCurrency}, #{targetCurrency}, #{thresholdRate}, #{alertType}, false)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_setting WHERE triggered = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_setting SET triggered = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
